```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(ggplot2)
library(scales)



df <- read.csv(
  "/home/nacho/HDD16/Nacho/RepliCOOC/derep/uniones_entre_plasmidos/V3/IS_length_distribution/IS_lengths.csv"
)

ggplot(df, aes(x = length)) +
  geom_histogram(
    binwidth = 100,
    color = "black",
    fill = "steelblue",
    linewidth = 0.2
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    limits = c(0, 5000),
    breaks = seq(0, 5000, by = 1000),
    labels = label_comma()
  ) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "IS length (bp)",
    y = "Count"
  )
```
